demographic_profile.summary: Small founding team members who are actively building and using their own product while making feature and development decisions. They combine their personal experience as users with external feedback to guide product direction, often wearing multiple hats and working with limited resources. They are frustrated by tools that don't scale with their growing but still small team size, and by the challenge of balancing internal vision with user feedback.
